human_actions_pending.context: Pending from 2 sessions ago — backend export.py redesigned with matplotlib charts + colored tables

decisions.decision: chartBody: grid (1fr auto 1fr) → flex (justify-content: center) for priority donut card
decisions.rationale: Fixed grid with 240px SVG broke at ~380px card width (e.g. 1000px viewport with sidebar); flex centers naturally at any width
At 960-1100px viewport, 1fr+340px grid made priority card only ~380-480px wide — too narrow for the donut layout

decisions.decision: statusChartBody: flex-direction row at ≤960px (donut left, legend right), column at ≤480px
decisions.rationale: When chartsRow collapses to 1fr, status card gets full width — horizontal layout uses space better

decisions.decision: severityCards: flex-wrap at ≤640px with reduced gap
decisions.rationale: 4 items × ~86px + 3 × 48px gap = 408px total, overflows 327px mobile content area
white-space: nowrap on sprintName without overflow control caused row overflow on long sprint names

decisions.decision: Navbar logo: left-aligned (not centered) on mobile, consistent all pages
decisions.rationale: User tested centered and preferred left next to hamburger. navLeft is same 36px on all pages so logo x-position is identical whether hamburger is present or not

decisions.decision: Removed pointer-events: none from navCenter (no longer absolutely positioned)
decisions.rationale: With left-aligned flow layout, navCenter is in normal flow — pointer-events: none no longer needed and would block logo clicks

next_action: Restart frontend container, then UAT in browser: sidebar animations, card responsive layouts at mobile/tablet, navbar logo left-aligned on all 3 pages.
context_notes: All 5 project phases complete (v1.0). Post-v1 UI polish. This session: responsive card internals (3 cards), navbar logo alignment. Key files changed: BugReportPage.module.css (chartBody flex, chartsRow 1100px, statusChartBody row/col, new breakpoints), SprintPage.module.css (sprintMeta min-width, sprintName ellipsis, severityCards wrap), Navbar.module.css (removed absolute centering, logo flows left naturally). All committed. jira_sprint_service.py has an uncommitted change of unknown origin — inspect before touching.
